I can schedule that — a couple quick clarifying items before I create the event.

I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19: you already have
- "Project Kick-off" 10:00–11:00 (conflict with the preferred 10:00 slot)
- "One-on-One with Manager" 11:00–11:30

Because 10:00 is taken, the earliest available 1-hour slots that day are (pick one):
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after your 11:00–11:30 meeting)
- 12:00–13:00
- 13:00–14:00
(If you prefer a different time window that day, tell me and I’ll search for it.)

Before I create the event, please confirm or provide:
1. Event title (or I can use “Follow-up Meeting”)  
2. Which time from the options above (or confirm 10:00 if you want me to try to double-book)  
3. Participants to invite (email addresses), if any  
4. Location (e.g., Office 44A, Zoom) or “None”  
5. Short description text to include (or say “Use this default: Follow-up to discuss action items and next steps.”)

Once you confirm those, I’ll create the 1-hour event and send invites.
